# Index evaluation {#market-index}

## Index trend (2 years)^[Data are from [Yahoo Finance](https://finance.yahoo.com/).]

```{r}
ticker = tribble(
  ~name, ~symbol,
  "USDKRW", "KRW=X",
  "S&P500", "^GSPC",
  "NASDAQ", "^IXIC",
  "KOSPI", "^KS11",
  "KOSDAQ", "^KQ11",
  "EUROSTOXX", "EXSG.F",
  "MSCIEM", "EEM",
  "WilshireREIT", "^WILREIT",
  "Gold", "GC=F",
  "Copper", "HG=F",
  "Oil", "CL=F")

index_2yr = tq_get(ticker$symbol, get = "stock.prices", from = twoyearsago)

index_2yr %<>% left_join(ticker)

index_2yr$low[index_2yr$name == "KOSPI" & index_2yr$date == "2020-05-06"] = 1925.55 # Correct wrong data

index_2yr %<>% 
  mutate(low = case_when(low == 0 & high == 0 ~ close,
                         low > close ~ close, 
                         T ~ low),
         high = case_when(low == 0 & high == 0 ~ close,
                          high < close ~ close, 
                          T ~ high))

index_plot = function(indexdata, .name, title) {
  indexdata %>% 
    filter(name == .name & !is.na(close)) %>%
    ggplot(mapping = aes(x = date, y = close)) + 
    geom_ribbon(mapping = aes(ymin = low, ymax = high), fill = line_color[1], alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_line(color = line_color[1]) +
    scale_x_date(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(x = "Date", y = title)
}
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "South Korea/U.S. Foreign Exchange Rate"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "USDKRW", "USD/KRW")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "KOSPI Index"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "KOSPI", "KOSPI")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "KOSDAQ Index"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "KOSDAQ", "KOSDAQ")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "S&P 500 Index"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "S&P500", "S&P 500")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "NASDAQ Composite Index"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "NASDAQ", "NASDAQ")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "iShares EURO STOXX Select Dividend 30 UCITS ETF"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "EUROSTOXX", "EURO STOXX 30")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "MSCIEM", "MSCI EM")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Wilshire US REIT Index"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "WilshireREIT", "Wilshire REIT")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Gold Price"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "Gold", "Gold price")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Copper Price"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "Copper", "Copper price")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Crude Oil Price"}
index_plot(index_2yr, "Oil", "Crude oil price")
```

## Index trend (>30 years)^[Data are from [Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis](https://fred.stlouisfed.org/).]

```{r}
ticker = tribble(
  ~name, ~symbol,
  "USGDP", "GDP",
  "Wilshire5000", "WILL5000PRFC",
  "WilshireREIT", "WILLREITIND",
  "Gold", "GOLDAMGBD228NLBM",
  "Copper", "PCOPPUSDM",
  "WTI", "DCOILWTICO",
  "USBond", "IRLTLT01USM156N",
  "AAA", "DAAA",
  "USDKRW", "DEXKOUS")

index_30yr = tq_get(ticker$symbol, get = "economic.data", from = as.Date(thirtyyearsago) - 30)

index_30yr %<>% left_join(ticker) %>% select(-symbol)

Shiller = read_html("https://www.multpl.com/shiller-pe/table/by-year", which = 1, header = T) %>% rename(Shiller = "\n\nValue\n\n\n\nValue\n")

Shiller$Date %<>% 
  str_match("([^ ,]+) ([^ ,]+), ([^ ,]+)") %>% 
  .[, -1] %>% 
  as_tibble %>% 
  setNames(c("m", "d", "y")) %>% 
  mutate(m = match(m, month.abb), date = str_c(y, m, d, sep = "-")) %>% 
  pull(date) %>% 
  as.Date

Shiller$Shiller %<>% as.numeric

Shiller %<>% 
  rename(date = Date, price = Shiller) %>%
  mutate(name = "Shiller")

USGDP = index_30yr %>% 
  filter(name == "USGDP") %>%
  mutate(year = format(date, "%Y") %>% as.numeric,
         month = format(date, "%m") %>% as.numeric) %>%
  rename(USGDP = price) %>%
  select(-c(date, name))

Wilshire5000_monthly = index_30yr %>% 
  filter(name == "Wilshire5000") %>%
  mutate(year = format(date, "%Y") %>% as.numeric,
         month = format(date, "%m") %>% as.numeric,
         month = ((month - 1) %/% 3) * 3 + 1) %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>% 
  summarise(price = mean(price, na.rm = T)) %>%
  ungroup %>%
  rename(Wilshire5000 = price)

Buffett = full_join(USGDP, Wilshire5000_monthly) %>% 
  mutate(price = Wilshire5000/USGDP,
         name = "Buffett",
         date = make_date(year = year, month = month, day = 1)) %>%
  select(-c(USGDP, Wilshire5000, year, month))

index_30yr = bind_rows(index_30yr, Shiller, Buffett) %>% filter(!is.na(price))

index_plot_fed = function(feddata, .name, title) {
  feddata %>% 
    filter(name == .name & !is.na(price)) %>%
    ggplot(mapping = aes(x = date, y = price)) + 
    geom_line(color = line_color[1]) +
    scale_x_date(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(x = "Date", y = title)
}
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Wilshire 5000 Full Cap Price Index"}
index_plot_fed(index_30yr, "Wilshire5000", "Wilshire 5000")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Wilshire US REIT Total Market Index"}
index_plot_fed(index_30yr, "WilshireREIT", "Wilshire REIT")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Gold Fixing Price 10:30 A.M. (London time) in London Bullion Market, based in U.S. Dollars"}
index_plot_fed(index_30yr, "Gold", "Gold fixing price")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Global Price of Copper (U.S. Dollars per Metric Ton)"}
index_plot_fed(index_30yr, "Copper", "Copper price")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Crude Oil Prices: West Texas Intermediate (WTI) - Cushing, Oklahoma"}
index_plot_fed(index_30yr, "WTI", "Crude oil price")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Long-Term Government Bond Yields: 10-year: Main (Including Benchmark) for the United States"}
index_plot_fed(index_30yr, "USBond", "Government bond yield")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Moody's Seasoned AAA Corporate Bond Yield"}
index_plot_fed(index_30yr, "AAA", "AAA corporate bond yield")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Wilshire 5000 Full Cap Price Index/Gross Domestic Product"}
index_plot_fed(Buffett, "Buffett", "Buffett indicator")
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = 8/2.5, fig.cap = "Cyclically Adjusted P/E (CAPE) Ratio for S&P 500"}
index_plot_fed(index_30yr, "Shiller", "Shiller P/E ratio")
```

## Index correlation

```{r, include = F}
daily = c("Wilshire5000", "WilshireREIT", "Gold", "WTI", "AAA", "USDKRW")
monthly = c("USBond", "Copper")

index_30yr_daily = index_30yr %>% 
  filter(name %in% daily) %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = date, names_from = name, values_from = price)

index_30yr_monthly = index_30yr %>%
  filter(name %in% monthly) %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = date, names_from = name, values_from = price)

index_30yr_cross = index_30yr_daily %>%
  mutate(date = make_date(year = format(date, "%Y"), month = format(date, "%m"), day = 1)) %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~mean(., na.rm = T))) %>%
  left_join(index_30yr_monthly)

index_dailycor = index_30yr_daily %>%
  mutate(interval = cut(date, 6)) %>%
  group_by(interval) %>%
  group_map(~cor(select(., -date), use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))

index_dailycor %<>%
  reduce(`+`) %>%
  divide_by(length(index_dailycor))

index_monthlycor = index_30yr_monthly %>%
  mutate(interval = cut(date, 6)) %>%
  group_by(interval) %>%
  group_map(~cor(select(., -date), use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))

index_monthlycor %<>%
  reduce(`+`) %>%
  divide_by(length(index_monthlycor))

index_crosscor = index_30yr_cross %>%
  mutate(interval = cut(date, 6)) %>%
  group_by(interval) %>%
  group_map(~cor(select(., all_of(names(select(index_30yr_daily, -date)))),
                 select(., all_of(names(select(index_30yr_monthly, -date)))),
                 use = "pairwise.complete.obs"))

index_crosscor %<>% 
  reduce(`+`) %>% 
  divide_by(length(index_crosscor))

index_cor = bind_rows(index_dailycor %>% as_tibble(rownames = "var1") %>% pivot_longer(cols = -var1, names_to = "var2", values_to = "r"),
                      index_monthlycor %>% as_tibble(rownames = "var1") %>% pivot_longer(cols = -var1, names_to = "var2", values_to = "r"),
                      index_crosscor %>% as_tibble(rownames = "var1") %>% pivot_longer(cols = -var1, names_to = "var2", values_to = "r"),
                      index_crosscor %>% t %>% as_tibble(rownames = "var1") %>% pivot_longer(cols = -var1, names_to = "var2", values_to = "r")) %>%
  pivot_wider(id_cols = var1, names_from = var2, values_from = r) %>%
  column_to_rownames("var1") %>% 
  as.matrix

relabel = function(symbol) c(Wilshire5000 = "Wilshire 5000", 
                             WilshireREIT = "Wilshire US REIT", 
                             Gold = "Gold fixing price", 
                             Copper = "Copper price",
                             WTI = "Crude oil price", 
                             USBond = "Government bond yield",
                             AAA = "AAA corporate bond yield",
                             USDKRW = "USD/KRW exchange rate")[symbol]

colnames(index_cor) %<>% relabel
rownames(index_cor) %<>% relabel

heatmap_body_size = unit(3.5, "inch")

h = Heatmap(index_cor, 
        name = "Pearson's r", 
        width = heatmap_body_size, height = heatmap_body_size, 
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
        heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_height = unit(1.5, "inch"))) %>%
  draw

h_height = convertHeight(h@ht_list_param$height, "inch") %>% as.numeric

grid_size = heatmap_body_size/nrow(index_cor)
```

```{r, fig.width = 7, fig.height = h_height + 0.2, fig.cap = "Pairwise correlation between the stock matket index, REIT index, gold price, copper price, crude oil price, bond yields, and USD/KRW exchange rate over the last 30 years (averaged over stratified 5-year intervals)"}
Heatmap(index_cor, 
        name = "Pearson's r", 
        width = heatmap_body_size, height = heatmap_body_size,
        row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontfamily = "Lato"),
        column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontfamily = "Lato"),
        heatmap_legend_param = list(legend_height = unit(1.5, "inch"),
                                    title_gp = gpar(fontfamily = "Lato"),
                                    labels_gp = gpar(fontfamily = "Lato")))

index_cor_clustered = index_cor[row_order(h), column_order(h)]

for (i in 1:ncol(index_cor_clustered)) {
  for (j in 1:nrow(index_cor_clustered)) {
    decorate_heatmap_body("Pearson's r", row_slice = 1, column_slice = 1, {
      grid.text(label = index_cor_clustered[nrow(index_cor_clustered) + 1 - j, i] %>% round(2),
                x = grid_size * i - grid_size/2, 
                y = grid_size * j - grid_size/2, 
                just = "center",
                gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontfamily = "Lato"))
    })
  }
}
```
